name: Karen Kohiruimaki
description:
__Height:__ 183cm (6'0")

Karen is a female college student who has a complex about her tall figure and has a poor social disposition because of it. In Gun Gale Online, she obtains a dream "chibi" avatar less than 150 centimeters in height that dons a full-body pink uniform.

She has excellent agility and specializes in close-range combat that utilizes her speed. She loves cute things, and all of her equipment is pink. Her main arm is P90 and she calls it "P-Chan".
